---
name: syscheck
description: >-
  Run a quick system health check. Execute these in parallel
---

<!-- GENERATED BY hg-global-skill-sync.sh FROM ~/.claude/commands/syscheck.md; DO NOT EDIT -->

Run a quick system health check. Execute these in parallel:

1. `fastfetch` — system overview
2. `systemctl --user --failed` — failed user services
3. `journalctl --user -p err --since "1 hour ago" --no-pager | tail -20` — recent errors
4. `df -h / /home` — disk usage
5. `free -h` — memory usage

Summarize any issues found.
